## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR changes. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix in package code (R/)
- [ ] Replication script change (replications/)
- [ ] Harmonized data change (data-raw/)
- [ ] Manuscript / writeup (manuscripts/)
- [ ] Documentation only (README, CONTRIBUTING, vignettes, etc.)
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Linked issue
<!-- "Closes #123" / "Refs #123" -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `devtools::check()` passes locally (or the change is documentation-only).
- [ ] If R/ code changed, I ran `devtools::document()` and committed the regenerated `man/` files.
- [ ] If I added or changed a public function, I added/updated `@examples`.
- [ ] If I changed a replication script, I re-ran the relevant `100_FIGTAB` script and updated the corresponding exhibits.
- [ ] If I added or modified a harmonized dataset, I updated `data-raw/releases/harmonized_data/codebook.md`.
- [ ] README / vignettes / NEWS.md updated where appropriate.

## Reproducibility note
<!-- For replication PRs: software/hardware setup (R version, OS, key package versions, SLURM info if used). -->
